artifacts.summary: Updated task 46-49 descriptions and created 4 seed research reports
Seed research for task 46: Burgess 2.2-2.5 literature map, per-file transfer analysis, Phase 0 prerequisites, implementation strategy
Seed research for task 47: Burgess 2.6-2.8 literature map, ChronicleTypes/PointInsertion transfer analysis, Xu C0-C6 formulation
Seed research for task 48: Burgess 2.9-2.10 literature map, omega construction, ~95% transfer rates, Denumerable instance requirement
Seed research for task 49: truth lemma, box-entanglement WARNING for countermodel files, fresh temporal approach, revised scope

completion_data.completion_summary: Updated task 46-49 descriptions with research findings (revised scope estimates, missing prerequisites, box-entanglement warnings) and created 4 seed research reports containing literature maps, infrastructure audits, and implementation guidance for each task.
